summary: Backend testing completed for daily report email system. All 18 tests passed - endpoints correctly validate RESEND_API_KEY configuration and require authentication.
critical_code_review_comments: RESEND_API_KEY is intentionally empty for testing validation - this is expected behavior
All admin endpoints correctly require JWT authentication
Scheduler correctly prevents enabling without proper API key configuration
seed_data_creation: None required - tests use existing admin credentials
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily report email system tests complete. All endpoints working correctly. RESEND_API_KEY is empty by design to test validation. Real email sending cannot be tested without valid API key. Endpoints tested: /api/admin/test-daily-report, /api/admin/report-config, /api/admin/scheduler/status, /api/admin/scheduler/enable, /api/admin/scheduler/disable, /api/admin/report-logs

authentication_tests: All 6 daily report endpoints correctly reject requests without auth (401)
Admin login works with credentials admin@pizzaria.pt / admin123
configuration_tests: POST /api/admin/test-daily-report correctly fails when RESEND_API_KEY not configured
POST /api/admin/scheduler/enable returns 400 when API key not configured
logs_tests: GET /api/admin/report-logs returns list (empty or with entries)
